title: Sieglingia plumosa

The plant is native to the mountainous regions of Europe, specifically the Alps and the Pyrenees. It belongs to the tribe Sanguisorbeae, which includes other flowering plants such as burnet and spirea. Sieglingia plumosa is a rare and endangered species due to habitat loss and fragmentation.
